translations.en: O! Hisham then mentioned possessors of alalbab bahsn remembrance and hlahm bahsn alhlyh so he said He gives wisdom who/whoever He wills and who/whoever he is given wisdom then indeed was given good much and what he remembers except possessors of the minds and said and the firmly grounded in knowledge they say we believed by it kl from 'nd rbna and what he remembers except possessors of the minds and said indeed in khlq the heavens and the earth and alternation the night and alnhar layat lawly the minds and said is? so whoever knows that only was sent down to you from your Lord alhq kmn he/it blind verily only he reflects possessors of the minds and said or who he/it qant hours of the night sajda and qa'ma is cautious the Hereafter and they hope rhmh his Lord ql hl are equal those who they know and those who not they know verily only he reflects possessors of the minds and said ktab We sent it down to you mbark lydbrwa His signs and lytdhkr possessors of the minds and said and lqd We gave Musa alhda and We made inherit children of Israel alktab hda and dhkra lawly the minds and said and dhkr for indeed the reminder tnf' the Believers
translations.ur: اے Hisham then mentioned possessors of alalbab bahsn remembrance اور hlahm bahsn alhlyh so he said He gives wisdom who/whoever He wills اور who/whoever he is given wisdom then indeed was given good much اور what he remembers except possessors of the minds اور said اور the firmly grounded میں knowledge they say we believed by it kl سے 'nd rbna اور what he remembers except possessors of the minds اور said بے شک میں khlq the heavens اور the earth اور alternation the night اور alnhar layat lawly the minds اور said is? so whoever knows that only was sent down to you سے your Lord alhq kmn he/it blind verily only he reflects possessors of the minds اور said or who he/it qant hours of the night sajda اور qa'ma is cautious the Hereafter اور they hope rhmh his Lord ql hl are equal those who they know اور those who نہیں they know verily only he reflects possessors of the minds اور said ktab We sent it down to you mbark lydbrwa His signs اور lytdhkr possessors of the minds اور said اور lqd We gave Musa alhda اور We made inherit children of Israel alktab hda اور dhkra lawly the minds اور said اور dhkr for indeed the reminder tnf' the Believers

translations.bn: হে Hisham then mentioned possessors of alalbab bahsn remembrance এবং hlahm bahsn alhlyh so he said He gives wisdom who/whoever He wills এবং who/whoever he is given wisdom then indeed was given good much এবং what he remembers except possessors of the minds এবং said এবং the firmly grounded মধ্যে knowledge they say we believed by it kl থেকে 'nd rbna এবং what he remembers except possessors of the minds এবং said নিশ্চয়ই মধ্যে khlq the heavens এবং the earth এবং alternation the night এবং alnhar layat lawly the minds এবং said is? so whoever knows that only was sent down to you থেকে your Lord alhq kmn he/it blind verily only he reflects possessors of the minds এবং said or who he/it qant hours of the night sajda এবং qa'ma is cautious the Hereafter এবং they hope rhmh his Lord ql hl are equal those who they know এবং those who না they know verily only he reflects possessors of the minds এবং said ktab We sent it down to you mbark lydbrwa His signs এবং lytdhkr possessors of the minds এবং said এবং lqd We gave Musa alhda এবং We made inherit children of Israel alktab hda এবং dhkra lawly the minds এবং said এবং dhkr for indeed the reminder tnf' the Believers
